svg.title: Gap analysis: what the plugin does vs what generates new thought
svg.desc: Diagram showing current inference pipeline vs missing generative layer

g.text: reflects your filing system, not concepts
measures coverage, not surprise or tension
no explanation of why it matters
watch topology emerge as threshold drops
hole in complex = question to answer

svg.text: The gap: system finds clusters (similarity) — it needs to find HOLES (generative tension)
A simplicial complex's topology IS the shape of your thinking. The voids are the questions.
